name: chem-inventory
description: 화학공장 수불관리 시스템 (원재료·부재료·Canister) — React + Express + CSV 저장

scripts.setup: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.test: npm --prefix server test && npm --prefix client test
